content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.43%, Bank Nifty -0.83%, VIX +2.7% to 17.07 — risk-off undertone, but IT (+0.75%) and Pharma (+0.61%) showing defensive/results-led strength. Book is +1.58% on the day with strong winners (PNBHOUSING +10.4%, COFORGE +7%, HAL +4.7%, CAMS +4.3%) — priority is to lock gains via SL trails on winners; admit-side is selective given VIX expansion and book already 63% deployed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +10.4%, CMP 1086.50. Stored SL 1066.24 sits 1.86% below CMP — already trail-gap compliant. Tightening slightly to 1055 (-2.9% from CMP, locks in +7.2% from entry 984) keeps room for normal noise while reducing downside. Stock approaching 52w high 1141.90; let it run to target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, -0.6% unrealized. SL 121 sits 2.7% below CMP 124.37 — gap appropriate. VIX rising supports the gold hedge thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.7%, CMP 4790.50. Stored SL 4725.56 = -1.35% from CMP — tighter than the 1% floor would dictate, but already at breakeven+. No change needed; this MODIFY is a no-op confirming. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% unrealized. SL 6960 = 1.19% below CMP 7044 — within the trail-gap floor. Q4 just digested (PAT +124%), MACD bullish, room to target 7400. Hold; do not tighten further or risk forced exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 836 sits only 0.5% below CMP 840.35 — too tight, forced-exit risk on normal noise. Loosening would be rejected by tighten-only rule. HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% unrealized, SL 365 sits 0.4% below CMP 366.35 — too tight to trail further (would force exit). Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY thesis intact. Let SL fire if it hits, do not preemptively close (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL at entry 820 = -1.55% from CMP 832.90. Q4 revenue +22%, FMCG defensive bid suits VIX expansion. Hold; SL already at breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7% unrealized, CMP 1346.60, stored SL 1329.47 = 1.27% below CMP — already trail-gap compliant and locks +5.6% from entry. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL at entry 3025 = -1.34% below CMP 3066. Concall May 12 (4 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary window). Hold to target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.3%, SL 827.41 sits 1.55% below CMP 840.90 — already locks +2.7% from entry, trail-gap compliant. No change needed; HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, intraday volatile post-Q4 (PAT +36.6% YoY beat). SL 1445 = -2.2% from CMP 1477.50, within budget. Thesis intact, hold to target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4%, Q4 concall TODAY May 8 — binary event live. Position is ~4.4% of capital (small, within event-trade size cap). Q4 print already out: PAT +87.5%, EBITDA margin 33.6%, US +56.9%. SL 2400 = -1.4% from CMP 2434, gives ~2.7% downside which absorbs concall noise. Hold through the call."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, SL 1545 = -4.5% below CMP 1619 — wide but appropriate given pharma volatility post-Q4 turnaround. Pharma sector at 52w high. Hold to target 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Open BUY @ 2015 placed 6 hours ago, has not filled. Auto sector flat (+0.06%), Bharat Forge has run; thesis stale, cancel to free up working order book and capital allocation."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed >2 days ago (3243m). Cancel — should not carry working MIS orders across sessions."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1066.24 to lock larger gain while keeping 2.9% gap from CMP for noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive carry, SL gap appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +3.3% above entry; gap to CMP only 1.35% but acceptable given defense-sector momentum. Don't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL gap 1.19% (above 1% floor). Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL too tight already (0.5% gap). Cannot loosen. Let it ride."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL very tight; let it fire if hit (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven already."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1329.47 already locks +5.6% from entry, gap 1.27% trail-compliant."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Concall May 12 outside 3-session window. SL at entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed; gap 1.55% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Concall today; position small; SL absorbs noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pharma 52w high momentum; wide SL appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong watchlist BULLISH candidates passed but rejected: (1) HAL/PNBHOUSING/NAVINFLUOR/COFORGE/CAMS/PIDILITIND/LUPIN/WOCKPHARMA/GRSE/MARICO/ABCAPITAL — already held, no double-up (Rule 10 cluster discipline). (2) INDUSINDBK — REJECTED: active SFIO criminal probe + RBI sector-wide derivatives investigation, Rule 13 governance overhang dominates the +3.9% relative-strength move; Day-5 round-trip lesson stands. (3) SRF / FINCABLES / POLYCAB / THERMAX / KPIL — all up >9% on the day, extended; chasing intraday breakouts on a -0.43% Nifty / VIX +2.7% session is poor R:R. Wait for pullback. (4) BHARATFORG / GABRIEL — auto sector flat, no momentum confirmation; cancelled the stale BHARATFORG BUY. (5) TATATECH / SOBHA / LAURUSLABS — observe for next session, no clear setup vs holdings. Book deployment 63%, holdings already broad across BFSI/Defense/Pharma/Specialty Chem/FMCG/IT — adding more on a risk-off tape with VIX expansion is unearned. Cash buffer 37% appropriate against current VIX print.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day +1.58% with 8 of 13 positions in profit, including 4 strong winners (PNBHOUSING +10.4%, COFORGE +7%, HAL +4.7%, CAMS +4.3%). Risk discipline: trailed PNBHOUSING SL up; left other winners' SLs unchanged where the trail-gap rule already prevents further tightening. Two stale working orders cancelled. Lupin concall today is the main binary — sized appropriately (~4.4% of capital), SL absorbs typical post-call move. No new admits this cycle: VIX expansion + Nifty/Bank Nifty red + book already 63% deployed across diversified themes argues for management focus, not chasing extended winners (most watchlist BULLISH candidates are up 5-15% intraday on the day's news). Will reassess admit side in afternoon batch if any pullback offers entry on quality names."
}
